session_summary: Completed cartography for MCP Management Crash Fixes lane (lane 2 of 9). Mapped 9 files across 4 packages. Key discovery: FI-002 (onSave no-op) is already fixed in current code — the follow-up-issues artifact is stale. Three critical issues remain: (1) addMutation skips electron-store persistence (MCP-006), (2) nested DialogEditMcp portal may close the wrong dialog (MCP-007), and (3) dual source of truth between sync.data.mcp and electron-store with no reconciliation (MCP-002). No tests exist for MCP UI components. Published 3 cross-session findings.
next_steps: Architect should address: (1) add electron-store persistence to addMutation.onSuccess, (2) fix nested dialog portal, (3) add reconciliation path in handleEdit for servers visible in sync.data.mcp but missing from electron-store.

findings.summary: MCP management has 3 critical issues: (1) addMutation does not persist to electron-store, (2) nested DialogEditMcp may close outer dialog via portal conflict, (3) dual source of truth between sync.data.mcp and electron-store with no reconciliation
Two completely independent MCP data sources: SDK status (sync.data.mcp) for display, electron-store for editing. No reconciliation path exists. addMutation bypasses electron-store entirely.
FI-002 already fixed — onSave handler now correctly persists to both electron-store and SDK. 9 files mapped across 4 packages.
